name: flutter-clean-architecture
description: Guide Codex to build Flutter apps with strict clean architecture and strong feature boundaries.

interface.shortDescription: Build Flutter apps with strict clean architecture
interface.longDescription: An opinionated Codex plugin for creating Flutter applications with feature-first folders, strict dependency direction, testable business logic, and pragmatic app scaffolding rules.
defaultPrompt: Create a Flutter app skeleton with strict clean architecture
Add a feature using domain, data, and presentation layers
Refactor this Flutter code to enforce clean architecture boundaries
